telfhash — algorithm attribution
=================================

APT115 implements the telfhash algorithm (symbol hash for ELF files) in
tools/triage/elf.js. The algorithm — symbol selection from the dynamic symbol
table, the exclusion strings/regexes, lowercasing, sorting, comma-joining and
TLSH hashing — is reimplemented from the reference project:

    trendmicro/telfhash — https://github.com/trendmicro/telfhash
    Copyright Trend Micro Inc.
    Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0

No source code from the project is bundled; only the algorithm is reproduced for
interoperability (telfhash values are meant to match the public ones, e.g. those
shown by VirusTotal). The underlying TLSH hashing is provided by the vendored
TLSH bundle (vendor/fuzzy/tlsh.min.js, see vendor/LICENSE-tlsh.txt).

A copy of the Apache License, Version 2.0 is available at:
    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
